overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a long coat and cowboy hat walking along a muddy forest path. The scene features dense pine forests, rocky outcrops, and atmospheric overcast lighting with a cool, desaturated color palette.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy forest trail with granite outcrops

agents.ego_description: character in long coat and hat walking steadily along the winding dirt path through dense pine forest

entered.detail: tall evergreen pine trees forming dense wall on left side of trail
tall evergreen pine trees forming dense wall on right side of trail
large gray rock formation beside the muddy path
distant rocky mountain visible through the tree canopy ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow muddy trail enclosed by dense pine forest. A large granite boulder sits to the right of the path while the trail winds toward a distant mountain peak visible through the misty trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail with fallen timber

events.description: large granite boulder passes out of view behind the character as the trail curves

agents.ego_description: character continues walking along the curving trail deeper into the forest interior

entered.detail: decaying fallen tree trunk lying beside the muddy path

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the granite boulder disappears behind and a fallen log comes into view on the right. The trail continues winding deeper into the forest with the distant mountain shifting to the left as the path curves.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a muddy forest trail that winds deeper into a misty pine wilderness. It begins with the character walking past a large granite boulder on the right, while a distant mountain peak remains visible through the dense, overcast trees. As the character progresses, the boulder recedes from view and the path curves, causing the distant mountain to shift toward the left of the frame. The scene then transitions as a fallen log appears on the right side of the trail, guiding the camera further into the secluded woodland.
